## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss progress and next steps for content creation projects with Ramp and Reddit, addressing workflow challenges and strategic improvements.](https://fathom.video/share/-s8vi3AfxKsezzNPxxPjnJjx5W5Tkrcw?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content quality needs significant improvement for both Ramp and Reddit projects, focusing on highly useful, example-driven articles](https://fathom.video/share/-s8vi3AfxKsezzNPxxPjnJjx5W5Tkrcw?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)
  - [Team is behind schedule due to onboarding delays; currently in Week 3 of engagement](https://fathom.video/share/-s8vi3AfxKsezzNPxxPjnJjx5W5Tkrcw?tab=summary&timestamp=5.0)
  - [10 articles for Ramp and 13 for Reddit are in progress, with a focus on higher-volume topics](https://fathom.video/share/-s8vi3AfxKsezzNPxxPjnJjx5W5Tkrcw?tab=summary&timestamp=21.0)
  - [Need to implement a more structured account review process to stay on top of multiple client projects](https://fathom.video/share/-s8vi3AfxKsezzNPxxPjnJjx5W5Tkrcw?tab=summary&timestamp=854.0)

## Topics

### Project Status and Timeline

  - [Engagement officially started August 14th, currently in Week 3](https://fathom.video/share/-s8vi3AfxKsezzNPxxPjnJjx5W5Tkrcw?tab=summary&timestamp=225.0)
  - [Week 1: Luke (client) was out](https://fathom.video/share/-s8vi3AfxKsezzNPxxPjnJjx5W5Tkrcw?tab=summary&timestamp=251.0)
  - [Week 2: Scheduling conflicts delayed kickoff](https://fathom.video/share/-s8vi3AfxKsezzNPxxPjnJjx5W5Tkrcw?tab=summary&timestamp=251.0)
  - [Week 3: Current week, playing catch-up](https://fathom.video/share/-s8vi3AfxKsezzNPxxPjnJjx5W5Tkrcw?tab=summary&timestamp=305.0)

### Ramp Content Strategy

  - [10 articles selected for initial batch, focusing on high-relevance and high-volume topics](https://fathom.video/share/-s8vi3AfxKsezzNPxxPjnJjx5W5Tkrcw?tab=summary&timestamp=425.0)
  - [Total search volume for selected articles: \~35,000](https://fathom.video/share/-s8vi3AfxKsezzNPxxPjnJjx5W5Tkrcw?tab=summary&timestamp=593.0)
  - [Calibration articles being worked on by Pink City, due before client meeting](https://fathom.video/share/-s8vi3AfxKsezzNPxxPjnJjx5W5Tkrcw?tab=summary&timestamp=372.0)
  - [Need to create Google Drive folder with organized taxonomy for easy client review](https://fathom.video/share/-s8vi3AfxKsezzNPxxPjnJjx5W5Tkrcw?tab=summary&timestamp=905.0)
  - [Goal: Match or exceed quality of Ramp's current articles](https://fathom.video/share/-s8vi3AfxKsezzNPxxPjnJjx5W5Tkrcw?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)

### Reddit Content Strategy

  - [13 articles selected for initial batch](https://fathom.video/share/-s8vi3AfxKsezzNPxxPjnJjx5W5Tkrcw?tab=summary&timestamp=425.0)
  - [Focus on creating harder, more in-depth content](https://fathom.video/share/-s8vi3AfxKsezzNPxxPjnJjx5W5Tkrcw?tab=summary&timestamp=966.0)
  - [Need for hands-on research and example-driven articles](https://fathom.video/share/-s8vi3AfxKsezzNPxxPjnJjx5W5Tkrcw?tab=summary&timestamp=1138.0)
  - [Challenge: Content must be genuinely useful and stand out from AI-generated answers](https://fathom.video/share/-s8vi3AfxKsezzNPxxPjnJjx5W5Tkrcw?tab=summary&timestamp=1172.0)

### Workflow Improvements

  - [Implement Monday account review meetings for better project management](https://fathom.video/share/-s8vi3AfxKsezzNPxxPjnJjx5W5Tkrcw?tab=summary&timestamp=755.0)
  - [30-minute sessions where account managers present weekly plans](https://fathom.video/share/-s8vi3AfxKsezzNPxxPjnJjx5W5Tkrcw?tab=summary&timestamp=818.0)
  - [Create Google Drive folder with organized taxonomy for client review](https://fathom.video/share/-s8vi3AfxKsezzNPxxPjnJjx5W5Tkrcw?tab=summary&timestamp=905.0)
  - [Utilize Airtable for content tracking and linking to Google Docs](https://fathom.video/share/-s8vi3AfxKsezzNPxxPjnJjx5W5Tkrcw?tab=summary&timestamp=910.0)

### Content Quality Concerns

  - [Deep render website traffic has significantly dropped (from \~1000 clicks/day to \~18 clicks/day)](https://fathom.video/share/-s8vi3AfxKsezzNPxxPjnJjx5W5Tkrcw?tab=summary&timestamp=1208.0)
  - [Need to focus on creating extremely useful, unique content for both Ramp and Reddit](https://fathom.video/share/-s8vi3AfxKsezzNPxxPjnJjx5W5Tkrcw?tab=summary&timestamp=1332.0)
  - [Suggestion to find examples, screenshots, and reference materials to enrich articles](https://fathom.video/share/-s8vi3AfxKsezzNPxxPjnJjx5W5Tkrcw?tab=summary&timestamp=1898.0)

### Other Client Updates

  - [Arena: Performing well](https://fathom.video/share/-s8vi3AfxKsezzNPxxPjnJjx5W5Tkrcw?tab=summary&timestamp=1606.0)
  - [Firework: Experiencing indexing issues, possibly due to large number of product pages](https://fathom.video/share/-s8vi3AfxKsezzNPxxPjnJjx5W5Tkrcw?tab=summary&timestamp=1630.0)
  - [Webstacks: Client likes the voice and tone, publishing has begun](https://fathom.video/share/-s8vi3AfxKsezzNPxxPjnJjx5W5Tkrcw?tab=summary&timestamp=1996.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Share Airtable with Ramp and Reddit teams for content review](https://fathom.video/share/-s8vi3AfxKsezzNPxxPjnJjx5W5Tkrcw?tab=summary&timestamp=1473.0)
  - [Tudera to post Ramp content in internal channel and Notion doc](https://fathom.video/share/-s8vi3AfxKsezzNPxxPjnJjx5W5Tkrcw?tab=summary&timestamp=1700.0)
  - [Implement voice and tone guidelines into content workflows](https://fathom.video/share/-s8vi3AfxKsezzNPxxPjnJjx5W5Tkrcw?tab=summary&timestamp=1705.0)
  - [Marcel to review Ramp articles before 10:30 AM meeting](https://fathom.video/share/-s8vi3AfxKsezzNPxxPjnJjx5W5Tkrcw?tab=summary&timestamp=2120.0)
  - [Improve aesthetic presentation of deliverables (e.g., agendas, competitive research)](https://fathom.video/share/-s8vi3AfxKsezzNPxxPjnJjx5W5Tkrcw?tab=summary&timestamp=2149.0)
  - [Consider hiring additional team members to handle increasing workload](https://fathom.video/share/-s8vi3AfxKsezzNPxxPjnJjx5W5Tkrcw?tab=summary&timestamp=2181.0)
  - [Follow up with Luke (client) on pending items](https://fathom.video/share/-s8vi3AfxKsezzNPxxPjnJjx5W5Tkrcw?tab=summary&timestamp=2022.0)
